prerequisites.text: Lanzar conjuros arcanos sin preparación de 1er nivel
Competencia con todas las armas marciales
7 rangos en 2 habilidades de Saber distintas
prerequisites.text_en: 7 ranks in two different Knowledge skills

prerequisites.text: 3 dotes de metamagia, creación de objetos o Soltura con Habilidad (Saber)
prerequisites.text_en: 3 metamagic, item creation, or Skill Focus (Knowledge) feats

prerequisites.text: Lanzar 7 conjuros divinos, ≥3 de 3er nivel o superior
prerequisites.text_en: Able to cast 7 divine spells, including 3+ of 3rd level or higher

prerequisites.text: Haber asesinado a alguien por motivos malignos
prerequisites.text_en: Must have killed someone for no other reason than to become an assassin
